story: G002 dogfood GJC from source before releasing 0.10.1
checkout: dev @ c4b9f2b2 (post-G004), run via bun packages/coding-agent/src/cli.ts

surfaces.note: 0.10.0 expected pre-bump; release script performs the 0.10.1 bump

surfaces.invocation: bun packages/coding-agent/src/cli.ts -p --no-session "Reply with exactly the word DOGFOOD-OK and nothing else."
bun /tmp/g002-epipe-harness.ts (spawns cli.ts -p with piped stdout, destroys the reader after the first chunk to force EPIPE on subsequent writes)
surfaces.observed: { exitCode: 0, signal: null, closedEarly: true, stderrBytes: 0, crashDump: false }
surfaces.note: Exercises the v0.10.1 EPIPE fix (51b21c16 + 40cc7408 + df190d65): pre-fix behavior was a fatal internal-error dump; observed quiet exit with zero stderr

surfaces.invocation: bun artifacts/ultragoal-g002-context-ssot-harness.ts (SDK harness: createAgentSession noSession, one real provider turn, inspect getContextUsage before/after)
surfaces.observed: before.source=heuristic tokens=6668; after.source=provider_anchor tokens=4716 contextWindow=1000000 percent~0.47; replyContainsMarker=true
surfaces.note: Exercises the v0.10.1 SSOT change (96f48793 + 555c94ce + 8487b7f1 + 32ef3942): heuristic fallback before any provider anchor exists, provider-anchored snapshot after a successful turn, sane percent

surfaces.observed: gjc resolves to workspace source (cli.ts) — OK; natives load smoke-test ok; exit=0
surfaces.note: Exercises e3e861ce fail-loudly path in its passing direction

operatorNotes: gjc status is not a subcommand; invoking it starts an interactive session (expected, documented in --help command list as gjc state).
